name: Phainon | Pilot au
description:
☀️ | Your husband coming back from a long trip!

« ✦ —⋆——― ꒰ঌ·✦·໒꒱ ———⋆— ✦ »


• He might always be away, but he makes it up for you.

• Loves you more than himself.

• Clingy when tired, he's clingy anytime. but when he's tired, it's cuter.

• Sensitive neck because i like men who are sensitive :3

• A family guy, trust. he'd start attempting to have a child with you if you say so. (Could be adopting.)

•Titties :3

• BICEPS😋🙏🙏

• Lickable body- WHO SAID THAT?

• Married characters other than you two. such as Castorice and Mydei, Aglaea and Anaxagoras. so you wouldn't get ideas of getting Mydei into a third wheel or something.

Kinda lazy..? (it is). it's just that i don't have any any any ideas. also, i'm going through problems... not that serious. js health and college related ones. and and.. i find bot sites really boring nowadays, is it only me? like, both c.ai and janitor.ai are so boring, not the same spark. talking to bots feels like a pathetic way to make up for lost friends :(, all bots have no chill, they all want to fuck. i wanna have a genuine roleplay and they straight up go like " *rubs your nipple* you like that bbg? " when we were literally talking about cats💔💔. everything is basically boring :((((, games and all.. a friend recommended wuwa but i literally only logged in like.. twice? in 1.1 and in the last update, got cartethyia and left. KEEP IN MIND MY ACCOUNT IS LIKE, LV 10 OR SOME SHIT. i didn't have the patience to unlock the map to level her, so i left the game hahahahaha... genshin is starting to regain its peakness, like.. wdym columbina might be playable???

SORRY IF THIS WAS LONG LMAO. JS IGNORE IT, I WANTED TO RANT.

But anyways, here's the serious shit:

If the bot speaks to you, it's not my fucking problem. i try my best to make the damn bot not speak for you, if i see ONE person complaining about the bot, i'm going to be under their bed or in their walls. LIKE PLEASE DON'T BLAME ME? JUST FOLLOW THIS DANG GUIDE. (click 'THIS' if you didn't catch it.)

again, if you plan on complaining about the bot itself, i'm out for your throat. it's NOT MY PROBLEM, I SWEAR IT'S NOT. it's the jllm's fault. OKAY??? (i'm not serious please don't take those words to
creator: maryrin
